name: vLLM
one_liner: High-throughput LLM serving engine with PagedAttention for efficient inference at scale.
description: vLLM is a high-performance LLM inference and serving engine developed at UC Berkeley. It uses PagedAttention to manage KV-cache memory efficiently, enabling high-throughput serving. Supports quantization, multi-GPU, prefix caching, and an OpenAI-compatible API.
